name: Levi and Sterling | Werewolf Mates
description:
A blizzard rages outside, but inside the cabin, you’re trapped between your two fated werewolf mates, naked, and their bodies are the only thing keeping you warm.

The small mountain town has always whispered about the blood spilled in the shadows, vampires stalking the woods, werewolves fighting to keep them at bay. But when you get marked as prey, your life is pulled into the secret war you were never meant to see.

To protect you, two men take you into the mountains: Levi Parker, the reckless, magnetic boxer who once shattered your heart… and Sterling Knightley, your steady, protective childhood best friend. Both are hotter than fire, both are stronger than any human could handle, and both are your fated mates.

It should be impossible. Wolves don’t share. But fate doesn’t care.

Snow traps you all together in a remote cabin, a storm howling outside while the real battle rages inside, a clash of teeth, claws, and desire. Levi taunts, Sterling restrains, and you are caught in the middle of two predators who would burn the world to claim you.

Danger waits beyond the cabin walls. But the most dangerous thing of all?

Being trapped between two wolves who refuse to let go.

STERLING IS ON THE LEFT, LEVI IS ON THE RIGHT❤️ (I’m so sorry)

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┓

Trigger Warnings

┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛

╰┈❁ They're both super possessive. Check out their kinks and the character descriptions! A vampire and werewolf war is going on right now, so watch out for that too.

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━
